name: @runanywhere/web-root
description: RunAnywhere Web SDK - On-device AI for the browser via RACommons WASM

scripts.build:wasm:all: npm run build:wasm -- --core --llamacpp --onnx && npm run build:wasm -- --webgpu
scripts.build:wasm:clean: npm run clean:wasm && npm run build:wasm:all
scripts.vendor:wasm:speech: npm run vendor:wasm:onnxruntime && npm run vendor:wasm:sherpa
scripts.build:ts: npm run build -w @runanywhere/proto-ts && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/llamacpp && npm run build -w packages/onnx
scripts.verify:nodenext: npm run check:esm-specifiers && npm run build:ts && tsc -p tsconfig.nodenext.json && node tests/types/nodenext-runtime.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/core && npm run lint -w packages/llamacpp && npm run lint -w packages/onnx && eslint playwright.config.ts tests/browser --max-warnings 0
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @runanywhere/proto-ts && npm run typecheck -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run typecheck -w packages/llamacpp && npm run typecheck -w packages/onnx && tsc -p tsconfig.browser.json && npm run verify:nodenext
scripts.clean:wasm: rm -rf wasm/build wasm/build-webgpu wasm/build-core wasm/build-llamacpp wasm/build-llamacpp-webgpu wasm/build-onnx packages/core/wasm packages/llamacpp/wasm packages/onnx/wasm
scripts.clean: rm -rf ../shared/proto-ts/dist packages/core/dist packages/llamacpp/dist packages/onnx/dist && npm run clean:wasm
